name: paper-iterative-accuracy-review
description: Apply a second-pass accuracy review to an academic paper after initial fixes, catching: (1) internal inconsistencies introduced by prior edits, (2) missed effect-size classification errors (Romano thresholds), (3) ambiguous table column headers, (4) unexplained counter-intuitive results, (5) missing pricing/cost context for readers. Use when a first round of fixes has been applied and you want to verify no new issues were introduced.
